title: Tractema monophyllos
uses: Tractema monophyllos is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine, primarily in Africa. The plant has been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal uses. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant's leaves are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal benefits. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's potential medicinal applications.
